scope: AgenC-owned token target parsing, budget continuation decisions, and token-budget prompt guidance.

requiredBehaviors: Parse shorthand token targets at the start of input, including decimal k/m/b suffixes.
Parse shorthand token targets at the end of input without matching unrelated natural language.
Parse verbose 'use/spend N tokens' targets anywhere in the prompt.
Return syntax highlight spans for each token-budget marker without double-counting a bare shorthand prompt.
edgeCases: End shorthand spans skip the leading whitespace captured by the regular expression.
Multiple verbose targets return multiple positions.

requiredBehaviors: Below 90% of the requested budget, emit a continuation decision with the formatted nudge message.
At or above 90%, stop once a continuation has already occurred and emit a completion event.
After at least three continuations, stop early when two consecutive deltas are under 500 tokens.
Skip token-budget auto-continuation for subagent turns and missing, zero, or invalid budgets.
edgeCases: The no-argument tracker factory still returns a tracker for the query loop because the query loop supplies the live budget at check time.
The total-budget-aware factory returns null for null, invalid, or nonpositive budgets.
Continuation messages include localized token counts and the no-summary instruction.

requiredBehaviors: The class-based tracker preserves mid-stream estimation as sampling-only state.
Boundary decisions use provider-reported output tokens for the current iteration.
Fresh turns reset token-budget counters and in-flight estimates.
edgeCases: Estimated in-flight tokens clear when boundary truth is resolved.
Reset clears continuation count, deltas, last global turn tokens, and emitted token state.

requiredBehaviors: The copied prompt path keeps the existing TOKEN_BUDGET feature gate and uses the shared token-budget section helper.
The AgenC-owned prompt assembly emits token-budget guidance after the dynamic boundary in normal mode.
Simple mode remains minimal and does not emit token-budget guidance.
edgeCases: The token-budget section text remains cached because it is static guidance.
Session-scoped dynamic sections continue to recompute independently of the cached token-budget section.

requiredBehaviors: All live callers import the canonical conversation token-budget module.
Old duplicate query, utility, and llm token-budget modules are removed instead of left as shims.
edgeCases: TUI prompt highlighting and REPL budget parsing use the canonical module.
The compact summarizer prompt does not carry token-budget guidance because it is a summarization-specific path.

carriedBehavior: Token-budget input span detection for TUI highlighting.
Below-threshold auto-continuation and at-threshold completion event behavior.
Diminishing-return stop behavior after repeated small deltas.
Static token-budget prompt guidance under the TOKEN_BUDGET feature gate.
intentionalReductions: The compact summarizer prompt does not receive token-budget guidance because it can conflict with summarization-only behavior.
API-side task_budget output configuration remains distinct from user-facing +500k token-target continuation.
Old duplicate token-budget modules were removed rather than retained as compatibility wrappers.
